hero.subtitle:
Full-Stack Developer · DevSecOps · Tech Creator
 I build, I share, I grow in public.

about.title: Know Who I Am.
about.description:
Hi! I'm Joeldy Simon TSINA a Full-Stack Developer based in France, DevSecOps enthusiast, and founder of MeggieOnTheStack.

My ambition is to become a strong female voice in tech not just following it, but building, speaking, and sharing to shape it.

I build scalable web applications, work across front-end and back-end, and explore data-driven solutions using technologies like React, Node.js, Python, and modern web tools.
about.quote: I don’t just follow tech — I shape it.
